isolated.reason: Async runtime imports + provider refresh seams; keep out of the shared lane.
Filesystem guard scans are sensitive to contention.
Mutates process.cwd() and core loader seams.

singletonIsolated.reason: Clean in isolation, but can hang after sharing the broad lane.
Builds the full bundled config schema graph and is safer outside the shared unit-fast heap.
Memory manager cache concurrency coverage can spike shared unit-fast heap on Linux Node 24.
Vector dedupe coverage exercises the memory manager/sqlite stack and is safer outside shared unit-fast forks.
Watcher config coverage reuses memory manager caches and is safer outside shared unit-fast forks.
Embedding batch coverage inflates memory manager state and is safer outside shared unit-fast forks.
Readonly recovery coverage exercises sqlite reopen flows and is safer outside shared unit-fast forks.
